title: Read-aloud audio for items + rationales (low-literacy / low-vision support)
context: Read-aloud audio for items and rationales supports low-literacy and low-vision learners and aligns with the read-aloud-audio sibling project. PII-free and offline-friendly.
objective: Add read-aloud audio for items and rationales as an accessibility feature, keeping it PII-free and offline-capable.
acceptanceCriteria: Items and rationales can be played as read-aloud audio in the practice surface
Feature collects no PII and works within the offline/no-account constraints
Non-official/non-advice labeling preserved on audio surfaces
